description_long: This object consists of two bright red cherry fruits connected by long, green, slightly curved stems that meet at the top. The cherries are round and glossy, with smooth surfaces reflecting light, giving them a fresh and ripe appearance. One of the cherries features three small, yellowish worm-like marks or blemishes, adding a touch of realism and imperfection. The stems are green with lighter streaks, mimicking the natural variegation found in cherry stems. No leaves or blossoms are attached to the stems, and the cherries are closely paired, hanging together as is typical for this fruit. The overall look is vibrant and lifelike, suitable for urban decorative or illustrative contexts.
description: A pair of glossy, bright red cherries with green variegated stems and small yellow blemishes on one fruit. The cherries are smooth, round, and closely paired, with no leaves or blossoms.
description_view_0: Front view showing both cherries, with the left cherry displaying three yellow blemishes and both stems clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the stems aligned vertically, mostly showing the back of the right cherry and the blemished side of the left cherry partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, glossy backs of both cherries and the arching stems, with only a hint of the yellow blemishes on the left cherry.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite direction, highlighting the right cherry's smooth surface and the yellow blemishes on the left cherry more prominently.
